mapper.insert: insert into user_progress ( user_id, game_type, level_num, source, updated_at ) values ( #{userId}, #{gameType, jdbcType=INTEGER, typeHandler=com.sniper.game.wordgame.typehandler.GameTypeEnumTypeHandler}, #{levelNum}, #{source, jdbcType=INTEGER, typeHandler=com.sniper.game.wordgame.typehandler.SourceEnumTypeHandler}, now() )
mapper.select: SELECT dr.rank_num AS `rank`, dr.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, dr.level_num AS levelNum, 0 AS isMe FROM ( SELECT user_id, level_num, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY level_num DESC) AS rank_num FROM user_progress WHERE game_type = #{gameType, jdbcType=INTEGER, typeHandler=com.sniper.game.wordgame.typehandler.GameTypeEnumTypeHandler} ) dr JOIN `user` u ON u.id = dr.user_id ORDER BY dr.rank_num, u.id LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT dr.rank_num AS `rank`, dr.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, dr.level_num AS levelNum, 1 AS isMe FROM ( SELECT user_id, level_num, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY level_num DESC) AS rank_num FROM user_progress WHERE game_type = #{gameType, jdbcType=INTEGER, typeHandler=com.sniper.game.wordgame.typehandler.GameTypeEnumTypeHandler} ) dr JOIN `user` u ON u.id = dr.user_id WHERE dr.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
